docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PARKMERCED COMPANY, A NEW YORK PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT ELGART, IGOR ELGART, REGINA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
